subject: 17–19 First Avenue – Proposed Sale / Authority Disputed [HR-BRI.FID852291]
snippet: Hi Ayrton Thank you for arranging the deposit of the retainer. I'll call you today to discuss. I have availability between now and 1pm then between 2pm and 4pm. Let me know what times suits you for
